title: Dierbachia cyanea
taxonomy: Dierbachia cyanea is classified as a species of flowering plant in the genus Dierbachia, which belongs to the family Acanthaceae. The Acanthaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as acanthus or acanthus family. Acanthaceae is part of the order Lamiales, a large and widespread group of flowering plants. This classification is based on the plant's morphology, anatomy, and genetic characteristics. The plant's classification is an ongoing area of research in botany.
